creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Please close your bug 262632 as a duplicate of this one. 

(In reply to David.Boyd49 from comment #0)

> … 14.0-CURRENT. …

I can not see a problem here. Tested in Konsole, retested at ttyv4 (without a desktop environment: 

cat /etc/rc.conf | dialog --programbox 23 76

----

% uname -aKU
FreeBSD mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd 14.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #6 main-n253776-d5ad1713cc3-dirty: Mon Mar 14 22:38:12 GMT 2022     root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p-freebsd:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG amd64 1400053 1400053
%
